item.title: Equersa 2026 - Registrations open
item.description:
Regisatrations open for Research Software Asia Australia, Research Software Africa, and Research Software Latin America at Equersa 2026.

Equersa 2026 early bird registrations are now open for the following group of online research conferences running 25th-28th August 2026:

  • Research Software Asia-Australia (RSAA26)
  • Research Software Africa (RSAfrica26)
  • Research Software Latin America (RSLA26)

Register now!

Important dates:

  • Early bird start: 15th July 2026
  • Early bird end: 24th July 2026
  • Regular start: 25th July 2026
  • Regular end: 14tth August 2026

Grab your tickets now!

Further details and link to apply: https://equersa.org/

item.title: Equersa 2026 - Call for Reviewers and Session Chairs
item.description:
Call for Reviewers and Session Chairs for Research Software Asia Australia, Research Software Africa, and Research Software Latin America at Equersa 2026.

Equersa 2026 is offering opportunities for Reviewers and Session Chairs for the following group of online research conferences running 25th-28th August 2026:

  • Research Software Asia-Australia (RSAA26)
  • Research Software Africa (RSAfrica26)
  • Research Software Latin America (RSLA26)

Application link

Applications due:

  • Call for reviewers: 15 May 2026
  • Call for session chairs: 7 August 2026

Please apply and help share the news!

Further details and link to apply: https://equersa.org/

item.title: Equersa 2026 - Call for Accessibility Fellows, Scholarships, and Micro-grants
item.description:
Call for Accessibility Fellows, Scholarships, and Micro-grants for Research Software Asia Australia, Research Software Africa, and Research Software Latin America at Equersa 2026.

Equersa 2026 is offering Accessibility Fellowships, Scholarships, and Micro-grants for the following group of online research conferences running 25th-28th August 2026:

  • Research Software Asia-Australia (RSAA26)
  • Research Software Africa (RSAfrica26)
  • Research Software Latin America (RSLA26)

Accessibility Fellowships aim to encourage individuals with disabilities from within our community or adjacent communities to join one of the three regional conferences.

Apply for accessibility fellowship!

Scholarships provide free conference tickets.

Micro-grants of $50 AUD (USD35 approx.) are intended to help with internet, headphones, childcare etc.

Apply for scholarship or microgrant!

Applications due:

  • Accessibility Fellowships: 26th June 2026
  • Scholarships: 14th August 2026
  • Micro-grants: 10th July 2026

Please apply and help share the news!

Further details and link to apply: https://equersa.org/#call-for-accessibility-fellows-scholarships-and-micro-grants-for-rsaa-rsafrica-and-rsla

item.title: Equersa 2026 - Call for Presentations
item.description:
The Call for Presentations (CFP) for the conferences Research Software Asia Australia 2026 (RSAA26), Research Software Africa 2026 (RSAfrica26), and Research Software Latin America 2026 (RSLA26) at Equersa 2026 are now open. This year’s theme, “Research Software Without Borders,” focuses on fostering collaboration and engagement within the research software community.

  • Research Software Asia-Australia (RSAA26)
  • Research Software Africa (RSAfrica26)
  • Research Software Latin America (RSLA26)

Submit your abstract for CfP!

Applications due:

  • RSAA26: 29th May 2026
  • RSAfrica26: 29th May 2026
  • RSLA26: 31st May 2026

Please apply and help share the news!

Further details and link to apply: Equersa 2026

item.title: Equersa 2026 and Research Software Asia Australia 2026
item.description:
RSAA26 - A research software community event for Asia and Australia

Do you want to learn what others are doing in research software in your domain and in other domains? Or do you want to discuss with others how you balance researcher needs with good software practices? Or maybe you are the only person working on research software in your group?

If so, you might want to join us for RSAA26, the fifth online annual Research Software Asia Australia Conference, from the 25th to the 28th of August 2026. This is a joint partnership between the RSE Asia Association and the RSE Association of Australia and New Zealand. The theme for this year is “Research Software Without Borders” and the hashtag will be #RSAA26.

Introducing Research Software Africa, Research Software Latinoamérica, and Equersa

We are thrilled to announce that we are helping to setup two new conferences Research Software Africa (RSA26) and Research Software Latinoamérica (RSLA26) under the umbrella of Equersa.

We are creating one joint organising committee, while co-chairs for each conference still get to choose what happens at their event.

As part of this one joint committee, we have created Equersa, an umbrella organisation to help coordinate the conferences and to provide a unified front to global funders and stakeholders.

More on RSA26, RSLA26, and Equersa soon!

  • Research Software Asia-Australia (RSAA26)
  • Research Software Africa (RSAfrica26)
  • Research Software Latin America (RSLA26)

Further details: https://equersa.org/

item.title: RSE Asia signs its first MoU with Asia Pacific Advanced Network (APAN)
item.description:
RSE Asia signs its first MoU with Asia Pacific Advanced Network (APAN) to promote Research Software Engineering (RSE) in the Asia-Pacific region.

RSE Asia is proud to announce the signing of its first Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Asia Pacific Advanced Network (APAN). This partnership marks a significant milestone in our mission to promote and support Research Software Engineering (RSE) across the Asia-Pacific region.

item.title: OLS team plants a tree dedicated to its cohort-4 in the OLS forest
item.description:
RSE Asia was launched as a project in the cohort-4 of the OLS.

The Open Life Science (OLS) team planted a tree dedicated to its cohort-4 in the OLS forest. RSE Asia was launched as a project in the cohort-4 of the OLS programme.

item.title: RSE Asia featured in the Collaborations Workshop 2022 highlights
item.description:
Proud moment for the RSE Asia community on getting featured in the Collaborations Workshop 2022 highlights.

RSE Asia got featured in the Collaborations Workshop 2022 highlights blogpost by the Software Sustainability Institute.
